title: portulaca samoensis
intro: Portulaca samoensis, also known as Samoan purslane, is a plant species within the Portulacaceae family, characterized by its succulent stems and leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting skin health. In herbal preparations, Portulaca samoensis is typically used in teas, infusions, and topical applications, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
